§lScroll of Flame Burst I§r
§8ITEM§r

•§lDispensable§r: YES

•§lImpact Hit Damage§r: 2

•§lImpact Area Damage§r: 0
•§lImpact Result§r: Creates spreading fires within a 4-block radius upon impact.
